description_long: This kiosk is a modern, modular commercial booth with a predominantly blue and white color scheme. The front features a large company logo sign above an open counter area, flanked by two vertical digital banners and a reception desk. The interior includes two round tables with chairs for visitors and a standing figure, suggesting a welcoming, interactive environment. The structure is composed of smooth, hard panels with rounded edges and integrated lighting fixtures on the upper frame. The side and rear panels are solid, providing privacy and branding space, while the open front allows easy access for customers. The roof is flat with partial overhangs and structural beams, contributing to a sleek, contemporary appearance.
description: A sleek, blue-and-white modular kiosk with an open front, digital banners, and integrated signage, designed for commercial interaction and customer engagement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open counter, company logo sign, digital banners, tables with chairs, and a reception desk.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid blue panel, structural beams, and the depth of the kiosk.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a fully enclosed blue panel with no openings or signage, emphasizing privacy and branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the edge of the kiosk, tables, and the structural overhangs of the roof.
attribute_signage_type: Printed and illuminated signs with company logo above the entrance and on side panels; digital display banners integrated into the front structure; visible text includes 'COMPANY LOGO' and 'BANNER'.
attribute_door_configuration: Single open archway at the front, no physical doors visible.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with partial overhangs and structural beams, constructed from smooth panels with integrated lighting.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern, minimalist with clean lines, bold colors, and integrated digital elements.
